headline: Built for Outreach
subheadline: Custom AI sales infrastructure to optimize talent acquisition and scale operations across 28 countries

challenges.title: Talent Scaling
challenges.desc: Outreach faces 9.9% YoY employee growth, straining recruitment in a competitive tech market. This requires efficient hiring timelines to maintain productivity. Global operations in 28 countries add complexity to standardized processes.

challenges.title: AI Integration
challenges.desc: As a sales engagement platform, Outreach must seamlessly incorporate AI into revenue workflows. Inconsistent AI adoption slows team performance. This impacts their ability to handle predictive analytics for sales teams.

challenges.title: Global Expansion
challenges.desc: Operating in 28 countries demands localized sales strategies. Cultural and regulatory differences complicate infrastructure. This hinders unified revenue operations across regions.

challenges.title: Retention Metrics
challenges.desc: With rapid growth, Outreach struggles with employee retention rates. High turnover disrupts sales teams. Data-driven approaches are needed to address this in their competitive environment.

deliverables.title: AI Recruitment Engine
deliverables.desc: Builds automated hiring systems that integrate with Outreach's CRM to streamline talent acquisition, reducing timelines by targeting tech skills

deliverables.title: Global Sales Workflow
deliverables.desc: Creates unified AI-driven workflows for 28 countries, integrating with existing platforms to enhance cross-regional operations and adapt to local needs

deliverables.title: Predictive Analytics Hub
deliverables.desc: Develops a dashboard that pulls from Outreach's data to forecast sales trends, integrating with their AI revenue platform for better decision-making

deliverables.title: Retention Tracking System
deliverables.desc: Constructs metrics-based tools that monitor employee engagement and integrate with HR systems, helping Outreach address turnover in real-time

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: We review Outreach's current sales infrastructure and identify key pain points in talent and operations.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: We design custom AI solutions and begin building integrations with their existing systems.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Optimization
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: We deploy the new infrastructure and optimize based on initial performance metrics.

faqItems.question: What is AI sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It's a system that uses AI to automate and optimize sales processes for B2B SaaS companies like Outreach.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with our tools?
faqItems.answer: We tailor integrations to fit Outreach's existing platforms, ensuring seamless data flow.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope; we provide a detailed quote after assessing Outreach's specific needs.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, depending on Outreach's complexity and our phased approach.

faqItems.question: Is this customizable for our growth?
faqItems.answer: Yes, we build it to scale with Outreach's 9.9% YoY growth and global operations.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Based on similar cases, expect improved hiring efficiency and revenue workflows, drawing from real data trends.

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Manages CRM integrations for Outreach's sales teams

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Handles data synchronization in revenue workflows

stackItems.name: Python
stackItems.role: Powers custom AI scripts for predictive analytics

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Tracks performance metrics for global operations

stackItems.name: Slack
stackItems.role: Facilitates team collaboration during infrastructure builds
